comment_content:
So we're just going to ignore the fact that everyone there- students and sensei alike- created an international incident by brawling with a weapon that got a student killed?  They're not ALL going to Spanish prison?  Spain doesn't look kindly on what they all just did.  Do the writers not know what "International Incident" means?  At the very least, they'll be returned home and barred from any and all karate tournaments for life- those involved and their dojos.  All of the Sensei would certainly get jail time in Spain before returning home.  The one who brought the weapon (Kreese) would get a very long sentence.  

This is crap that they all get to return home without any trace of a criminal record.  Kreese is an escaped convict!  How did he get a flight out there?  He gets to just walk out of prison and board a plane out of the country?   He should get to spend the rest of his life behind bars for fighting and getting a kid killed with his knife.

Writers got stupid and lazy this season.
